sc_data_source: SC_Data_2026-04-16.json (real: Sales Dashboard + FBA Orders + FBA Inventory; estimated: 7-day/30-day sessions)

fountain.daily_velocity_note: 9 units / 30 days (Mar 17-Apr 16) = 0.30/day. Slightly improved from 0.29 yesterday.
fountain._bsr_note: BSR softened to 145,776 (from 140,726 yesterday — zero-sale day). 7-day trend: +29,224 improvement vs last week. BSR will recover with next sale.
fountain._inventory_delta: +1 available vs yesterday (374→375). Reserved released (5→4). No net inventory change.

filters.daily_velocity_note: 6 filter units (5 standalone + 1 bundle component) / 30 days = 0.20/day

bundle._note: Bundle sale Apr 15 confirmed via FBA orders. Component inventory settled.

pl_7day._note: 7-day P&L: 1 standalone fountain + 1 bundle. ZERO-SALE DAY today (Apr 16). Revenue DOWN vs last 7-day ($114.98 vs $164.97) because Apr 9 fountain ($49.99) dropped out of window — window math, not business deterioration.

filters._note: No standalone filter sale in Apr 10-16 window.

_calculation_notes.wow_change: Revenue DOWN $49.99 vs last 7-day ($164.97) due to Apr 9 fountain exiting window. Gross profit DOWN from $64.45 to $46.32. This is window math — cumulative revenue trend still positive.
_calculation_notes.contribution_margin: Cannot calculate — ad spend data unavailable (Campaign Manager inaccessible). Estimated ad spend ~$57/week → estimated contribution margin: $46.32 - $57.40 = -$11.08

pl_7day._razor_blade_note: 0 standalone filter units / 1 fountain unit = 0.0. Bundle contains 1 filter component counted as bundle revenue. Effective filter attach rate via bundle: 1/1 = 1.0. Combined ratio ≥ 1.0 when counting bundle filters — target achieved this week.

totals._note: 30-day unchanged from yesterday (dropped Mar 16 with 0 sales, added Apr 16 with 0 sales). Gross margin steady at $236.76. Estimated 30-day ad spend ~$390 → estimated 30-day contribution margin: $236.76 - $390 = -$153.

cash_flow_4week._note: Real 7-day data. Zero-sale day (Apr 16) weighs on week. Contribution margin -$11.08 (better than -$26.55 from 2 weeks ago — trend improving). If auto campaign paused: improves to +$10.42.
Assumes 1 fountain + 1 bundle (consistent with recent 7-day trend). If auto/losing keyword paused saves $21.50/week → contribution margin improves to $28.55.
Assumes PPC optimizations implemented (pause waste, scale winner). Approaching May aged inventory surcharge.
cash_flow_4week._aged_inventory_warning: May aged inventory surcharge ~$128.84 due around May 1. Approximately $32/week impact if spread over 4 weeks.

cash_flow_4week._note: Assumes 1 additional bundle/week as bundle PPC launches. Surcharge already absorbed in prior week.

alerts.message: Auto campaign + losing keyword: $21.50/week ongoing waste — 15 consecutive days unaddressed.
alerts.action: Victor must manually access advertising.amazon.com to pause these. Saves $93/month immediately. Contribution margin goes from -$11 to +$10.50 per week.

alerts.message: Campaign Manager UNAVAILABLE for 15th consecutive day — true contribution margin cannot be calculated.
alerts.action: Victor needs to access advertising.amazon.com manually or grant browser access for automation.

alerts.message: 7-day revenue fell to $114.98 (from $164.97 last week) — Apr 9 fountain ($49.99) dropped out of window. Not a business decline.
alerts.action: No action needed. Gross profit -$18 is window math. Next fountain sale restores revenue trend.

alerts.message: FEELNEEDY B0F9WQGMH7 CROSSED 1,000 reviews TODAY. Amazon milestone boost likely over next 7-14 days.
alerts.action: Monitor FEELNEEDY BSR daily this week. Increase bids on profitable keywords by 10-15% to maintain visibility. Focus on review acquisition to close gap.

alerts.message: 0 new reviews in 8+ days. 21 reviews total. Buyers from Apr 9, 12, 15 have not reviewed.
alerts.action: URGENT: Use 'Request a Review' for all 3 recent orders immediately. Apr 12 buyer (fountain) received product by now — best window for review request today.

alerts.message: 375 fountain units in excess. May aged inventory surcharge ~$128.84/month approaching (~May 1).
alerts.action: BSR recovery and next sale are the primary lever. Continue PPC consistency.

alerts.message: Bundle sale (Apr 15) contributes $28.19 gross profit vs $18.13 for standalone fountain — 56% more profit per transaction.
alerts.action: Launch bundle PPC campaign targeting 'cat water fountain bundle' and 'fountain with filters' keywords. Budget $15/week for 43% margin product.

alerts.message: BSR 145,776 today — softened from best-ever 140,726 (expected on zero-sale day). 7-day improvement: +29,224 positions vs last week.
alerts.action: Next sale will push BSR back toward or below 140K. Consistent 1-2 sales/week maintains BSR trajectory toward sub-100K.

alerts.message: Estimated 7-day contribution margin -$11.08 — improved from -$26.55 two weeks ago. Trend improving without even pausing waste.
alerts.action: Pausing auto campaign + losing keyword immediately improves to +$10.42/week. Bundle PPC adds ~$15-20 more. Path to cash-positive operations is clear.

kpis._notes: Zero-sale day Apr 16. 7-day revenue/profit lower due to window shift (Apr 9 fountain dropping out). 30-day unchanged at 15 units/$614.90.
